---
title: "Professional Summary"
title-block: false
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-copy: true
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
html, body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  height: 100%;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
}

main.content {
  max-width: 100% !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

.quarto-title-block {
  display: none !important;
}

.resume-container {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 100vh;
}

.resume-frame {
  flex: 1;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 90vh;
  border: none;
}

.contact-footer {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 16px;
  font-style: italic;
  border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
  background-color: #fff;
}

.contact-footer a {
  text-decoration: none;
}
</style>

<div class="resume-container">
  <iframe
    src="documents/BdeGouw_Resume.pdf"
    class="resume-frame">
  </iframe>

  <div class="contact-footer">
    <strong>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bowen-de-gouw" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a> ·
      <a href="https://github.com/bdegouw" target="_blank">GitHub</a> ·
      <a href="mailto:bdegouw@bu.edu">bdegouw@bu.edu</a>
    </strong>
  </div>
</div>
